name: Sauteed Greens for Piadini
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh spinach or Swiss chard
1/2 pound Broccoli top (cime di rapa), or other bitter greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and cime di rapa thoroughly, discarding the darkest outer leaves of the cabbage.
2. Cut off the stem of the broccoli and cabbage; cut cabbage into quarters.
3. Bring 3 or 4 quarts of water to a boil. Add salt and cook the cime di rapa for 8 to 12 minutes, then drain.
4. Cook chard stalks in their own water with salt until tender (15 to 20 minutes). Cook cabbage without salt for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Drain spinach leaves, adding just enough water that clings to the leaves and a pinch of salt to taste.
6. Gently squeeze moisture from all greens; chop coarsely.
7. Heat olive oil in a medium sauté pan over medium heat until lightly colored. Add garlic and cook 1 minute more.
8. Add chopped greens, turning frequently with a fork to coat evenly. Season with salt and pepper. Cook for about 10 minutes or until tender.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
10. Serve hot.
Serves 6.
